description_long: This is a group of large, industrial-style dumpsters, each featuring a robust, rectangular metal body with domed, hinged lids. The dumpsters are equipped with multiple black wheels for mobility and have several black garbage bags and small debris scattered around them, suggesting active use. The lids have visible circular openings and reinforced edges, likely for durability and ease of access. Handles are present on the sides and rear, designed as sturdy metal bars for manual maneuvering. The dumpsters are primarily gray, with a matte finish, and show no visible warning labels or signage. These dumpsters are typically found in outdoor commercial or residential alleyways, designed for bulk waste collection and easy transport.
description: A set of large, gray, domed-lid dumpsters with wheels, side handles, and scattered garbage bags, designed for outdoor waste collection. The dumpsters have sturdy metal construction and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the domed lids, side handles, and several black garbage bags clustered around the dumpsters.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the dumpsters, the arrangement of wheels, and the scattered debris and bags in front.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view displaying the back handles, domed lids, and a clear view of the garbage bags and small debris.
description_view_3: Front view showing the main access side of the dumpsters, the domed lids with circular openings, and the wheels beneath.
attribute_lid_type: domed, hinged, split into two sections per dumpster, made of steel, no visible locking mechanism
attribute_handle_design: multiple bar-shaped metal handles on sides and rear
attribute_placement_location: outdoor commercial area or residential alley
